description:
Live-preview of LSP renames in the buffer as you type. Noice.nvim already has the preset option (currently disabled in noice.nix line 38).

Steps:
1. Add inc-rename.nvim plugin
2. Set `inc_rename = true` in `home-modules/editors/neovim/ui/noice.nix`
3. Add keymap (e.g. `<leader>cr` for rename)
title: Enable inc-rename.nvim
